caption: A group of people practice martial arts in a large, well-lit ballroom featuring high ceilings and ornate chandeliers. Several practitioners are dressed in traditional attire; some wear blue uniforms, one wears a yellow uniform, and another wears a white uniform. In the center of the room, a person in yellow and a person in blue engage in a choreographed sequence. The person in yellow moves dynamically across a blue mat, while the person in blue holds a long wooden staff, swinging it in a wide arc. Other students in blue and white uniforms stand nearby, observing or practicing their own movements. In the background, a crowd of spectators sits at round tables, watching the demonstration. As the sequence progresses, the practitioner in yellow shifts their stance to dodge the staff, while the practitioner in blue continues to maneuver the weapon.
